title: Pungent Dense Syrian Lamb Kebabs
description: A traditional Syrian dish featuring lamb kebabs with a dense and bitter flavor profile, made with breadcrumbs and shio-koji cure, and ayurvedic-tamasic friendly ingredients. This dish is perfect for a dinner meal.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, making sure it reaches a safe internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the lamb cubes, breadcrumbs, shio-koji cure, ayurvedic spice blend, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the bowl and mix until just combined.
Thread the lamb mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the kebabs with olive oil and place them on the grill.
Cook the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through and slightly charred.
Remove the kebabs from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
